executive_summary: Master Service Agreement v4.2 risk and obligation analysis: 3 risk(s), 0 gap(s) and 3 mitigation action(s) identified. Top risk: Uncapped financial exposure from general commercial claims
key_highlights: Uncapped financial exposure from general commercial claims
Automatic renewal without explicit affirmative action

tables.title: Top findings
rows: Uncapped financial exposure from general commercial claims
Section 7.3 creates uncapped financial exposure because it contains no liability ceiling for general commercial claims
Section 7.8 shortens the claim window to 12 months, which is tighter than Meridian’s approved 24-month fallback for str…
Automatic renewal without explicit affirmative action
Automatic 12-month renewals unless notice is delivered 90 days before the renewal date
tables.speaker_notes: Findings grounded in the structured/document-agent payload.
